title: The Perpendicular Purple Polly
content:
The Perpendicular Purple Polly,
    who read the Newspaper and ate Parsnip Pie
    with his Spectacles.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "The Perpendicular Purple Polly"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
